leakage_rationale: TUG phase windows are deterministic functions of raw LowerBack Acc-Z/Gyr-Z. PH/MFDFA features are extracted per subject/phase with no UPDRS labels, no cohort statistics, and no target-derived selection.

phase_policy.sit_to_stand: LowerBack Acc-Z abs peak in first third, [-0.8s,+2.0s]
phase_policy.turning: LowerBack Gyr-Z abs peak in second half, [-1.0s,+1.5s]
phase_policy.turn_to_sit: LowerBack Acc-Z abs peak in final third, [-1.5s,+1.0s]
